channel.title: FMaInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMaInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Conservatives Urge Trump to Invoke Little-Known Constitutional Authority for DHS Funding
item.description: A coalition of Washington conservatives is pressing President Trump to use a constitutional provision to secure Department of Homeland Security funding amid congressional budget disputes.

item.title: Cash ISA vs Stocks and Shares ISA in 2026: Comparing Your Options
item.description: With cash ISAs offering strong rates and investment ISAs attracting new participants, UK savers face a more complex choice than usual heading into 2026.

item.title: Cadence Design Systems Exceeds Q1 2026 Expectations on AI Demand
item.description: Cadence Design Systems reported first-quarter 2026 results after market close Monday, citing accelerating demand for AI-related design tools as a key growth driver.

item.title: Chernobyl Faces Renewed Radiation Risks After Strikes on Ukrainian Nuclear Sites
item.description: The International Atomic Energy Agency warned that damage to Chernobyl's protective shell could significantly reduce its intended 100-year operational lifespan.
